productName: COLLAB 1g - Birthday Cake (Spencer's Mountain) & Grape Ape (Hannah) (I)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Birthday Cake and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, sweet, and butter, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
